TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Lwax khu' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 44 buwan, 80 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 31 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 49 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 34%, saySiyat 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lwax khu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lwax khu' hya' ga Trayan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lwax kħuʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lwax kħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na lwax kħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lwax kħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na lwax kħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lwax kħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa trajan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Lwax khu' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 44 buwan, 80 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 31 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 49 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 34%, saySiyat 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lwax khu' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lwax khu' hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lwax khu' hya' ga Trayan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lwax kħuʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lwax kħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na lwax kħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lwax kħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na lwax kħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lwax kħuʔ ħjaʔ ɣa trajan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
